caption: A surfer rides a massive, dark blue ocean wave that is curling over into a white, frothy crest. The surfer is a small silhouette wearing a dark wetsuit, balanced on a surfboard and gliding down the steep face of the water. To the right, a huge wall of white spray and foam crashes downward, creating a dramatic contrast with the deep teal tones of the wave. As the sequence progresses, the surfer maintains their position on the face of the wave, moving slightly forward and downward while the towering wall of white water continues to break and tumble behind them. The horizon is obscured by a hazy, overcast sky that blends with the mist of the crashing surf. There are no visible logos, text, or other people in the scene.
